Instantiable , ModelErrorHandler , MoMLExportable , Nameable , java.io.Serializable, TypedActor public class AudioPlayer extends Sink This actor accepts an ObjectToken that contains a DataSource. This is typically obtained from the output of the S

his is typically obtained from the output of the StreamLoader actor. This actor will play Datasources containing a MP3, MIDI, and CD Audio file. After the model is run, a window will pop up allowing control of playing, rate of playback, an

allowing control of playing, rate of playback, and volume control. Since: Ptolemy II 4.0 Version: $Id: AudioPlayer.java,v 1.13 2004/04/13 05:12:08 cxh Exp $ Author: James Yeh See Also: Serialized Form Accepted Rating: Red (cxh) Proposed Rating: Red
